notes: Attempt 2: Fixed two style review failures from attempt 1. (1) INV-style-132: Changed 'You must also be able to' → 'You also need to be able to' in the Revert note to avoid 'must' directed at people. (2) INV-style-139: Added bold '**Required permissions**' title on a separate line after {% note %} in the Publish, Revert, and Unpublish notes (all have 2+ sentences). The Move note (single sentence) remains correctly exempt. No permission facts, cross-references, tone, or other content was changed — only the two style fixes identified in review feedback.
